name: Chicken'n' Vegetable Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 each Medium Red or Green Pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts into thin strips.
2. Cut sweet peppers into thin strips.
3. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook, stirring constantly, for 10 minutes or until golden brown and vegetables are crisp-tender.
4. Thoroughly blend the Golden Onion Soup Mix, cornstarch, ginger, water, soy sauce, and vinegar in a bowl.
5. Stir the blended mixture into the skillet with chicken and vegetables. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 10 minutes or until the sauce thickens.
6. Serve over hot rice and garnish, if desired, with sliced green onion and toasted sesame seeds.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Omit oil and deglaze ginger by adding 1/4 teaspoon water.
2. In a 2-quart casserole dish, heat chicken uncovered at HIGH (Full Power) for 4 minutes or until almost done; remove chicken and drain.
3. Add vegetables to the casserole and heat uncovered for 5 minutes at HIGH (Full Power).
4. Thoroughly blend the Golden Onion Soup Mix, cornstarch, ginger, water, soy sauce, and vinegar in a bowl. Stir into the vegetables. Heat uncovered for 5 minutes at HIGH (Full Power) or until the sauce thickens.
5. Return chicken to the casserole and heat for 1 minute or until heated through. Let stand covered for 5 minutes before serving. Garnish as desired.
